## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code style improvement
- [ ] CI / build configuration change

## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please ensure:

### Code Quality

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md) document
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (ruff compliant)
- [ ] I have added type hints for all public functions and methods
- [ ] I have run `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` with no errors
- [ ] I have run `mypy mcp_pm` with no errors

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with `pytest`
- [ ] I have updated any affected test fixtures or snapshots

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, docstrings, etc.) if needed
- [ ] I have updated the [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md) following `Keep a Changelog` format

### Compatibility

- [ ] My changes work on Python 3.11, 3.12, and 3.13
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new dependencies without discussion

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain your changes.

## Additional Notes

Add any other context about the PR here.
